text: Stepping inside this space, awash in a sterile hum and geometric reflections, I am overcome by a sense of observation—am I the observer, or am I being observed? The bright lights and curated displays evoke a strange tension, both inspiring curiosity and hinting at unseen eyes. I feel simultaneously exposed and yet distant, pondering the boundaries between knowledge, perception, and the subtle pressure of always being on display. In this moment, I am conscious of my presence as both participant and subject.
